response:
Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about the choices people make in their educational paths. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree. Let me be clear: vocational training is a waste of time, a misguided attempt to gain a diploma without the real knowledge and skills needed to succeed in the modern world. Those who opt for vocational training are not smart, not educated, and not prepared for the real world. They are just trying to get a job without the proper qualifications. I don't understand why anyone would choose such a path when there are so many better options available. Let me say this: vocational training is a disgrace, a betrayal of the very principles of education. And I will never support or respect anyone who chooses this path. Thank you.

do
